ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample pool the sequence belongs to */,
  "seq" TEXT /* The actual genetic sequence */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the genetic sequence */,
  "percent_gc" REAL /* Percentage of Guanine-Cytosine content in the sequence */,
  "tm" REAL /* Melting temperature of the sequence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sequence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sequence was last updated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sequence */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sequence */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the sequence is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample pool */,
  "pool_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample pool */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the pool is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pool was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pool was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pool */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the pool is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pools_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence that was analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was last updated */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Name of the tool used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotator who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence that was annotated */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* The actual annotation text */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotator who made the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the annotation was last updated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, annotator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence version */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sequence */,
  "seq" TEXT /* The actual genetic sequence in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sequence */,
  "child_sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child sequence */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., variant, derivative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_relationships_child_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_relationships_parent_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)
